# PERF-012 positive: db.Prepare on a request path
lang: go
file: PERF-012-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func LookupUser(db *sql.DB, c *gin.Context) {
	stmt, err := db.Prepare("SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id = ?")
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	defer stmt.Close()
	id := c.Param("id")
	row := stmt.QueryRow(id)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": id, "row": row})
}
